title: biophytum mimosella
intro: Biophytum mimosella, also known as 'Pui' or 'Mukunji', is a low-growing, evergreen herb native to the tropical regions of the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, sore throat, and digestive issues, as well as the prevention of certain types of cancer. In Ayurvedic medicine, Biophytum mimosella is prepared as a decoction or powder, which can be consumed internally or applied topically to the affected area.
